name: Monterey Artichoke Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain artichoke hearts well, reserving marinade.
2. Heat 1 tablespoon fat (from the reserved marinade) in a small skillet over medium flame.
3. Add onions and garlic to the skillet; sauté for 4-5 minutes until softened.
4. Cut artichoke hearts into small dices.
5. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and mix well.
6. Pour the mixture into a greased baking pan.
7. Bake at 325°F (165°C) for 25-30 minutes or until firm.
8. Remove from heat; let stand for 20-30 minutes.
9. Cut into finger-sized bars.
10. Serve slightly warm or at room temperature.
